recap: Added hot-reload: module-level imports in tab_bar.py, reload.py with reloadTabBar(), generation counter in statusbar.py to prevent timer accumulation, beacon-triggered reload, kitty-tab-bar-reload script, and alt+shift+r keybinding.
Validated: `kitty @ set-tab-color --match "id:<tabId>" active_bg=NONE` triggers an immediate Tab Bar redraw with no visual side effects. Architecture assumption confirmed.
Created kitty-redraw script: calls `kitty @ set-tab-color --match all active_bg=NONE` to trigger Tab Bar Redraw; silent on success, exits non-zero if Kitty unreachable.
Added kitty-tab-attention (󱅫) and kitty-tab-fullscreen (󰈈) to icons.jsonc and rebuilt dist files.
Renamed kitty-refresh to kitty-reload; replaced kill -SIGUSR1 approach with beacon touch + kitty-redraw call; updated callers in kitty-tab-attention-add/remove; updated comments in statusbar.py.
Fixed kitty-tab-attention-add to create the attention file and parent dir if absent; replaced kitty-reload with kitty-redraw in both scripts; added bats tests for all 8 behavioral requirements.
Updated parseRawTabData.py: loads icons.json once at module level, reads Attention File fresh on each Redraw, appends Attention Icon before fullscreen icon when active.
